headline: S&P 500 Hits Record 7,500, Dow Crosses 50,000 As Cisco, Nvidia Power AI Rally: Stock Market Today

headline: The Pentagon Has Less Than 8 Months to Break China’s Rare Earth Grip
summary: The Pentagon is urgently accelerating domestic rare earth supply chains as China tightens export controls ahead of a 2027 U.S. defense ban on Chinese-origin rare earth materials.

raw.headline: The Pentagon Has Less Than 8 Months to Break China’s Rare Earth Grip
raw.summary: The Pentagon is urgently accelerating domestic rare earth supply chains as China tightens export controls ahead of a 2027 U.S. defense ban on Chinese-origin rare earth materials.
